description: n8n internal REST API endpoints (session-cookie auth, not public API key auth)

auth.note: Public API key (X-N8N-API-KEY) does NOT work for internal endpoints

list.response: { data: { count: number, data: Array<{ id, name, projectId, columns }> } }

create.response: { data: { id, name, projectId, columns: Array<{ id, name, type, index }> } }

body.versionId: string (required — must be current, get from GET /api/v1/workflows/{id})

activate.note: Stale versionId causes silent failure (200 but active stays false)

list.note: Use this to get projectId for data table operations

dataTableNodeConfig.description: n8n-nodes-base.dataTable node requires specific parameter format
commonErrors: Missing 'resource: row' — causes 'Could not find property option' on activation
Using __rl wrapper — not needed, use plain { mode, value }
Using 'filters' param on get operation — not a valid property, use returnAll + client-side filter

gotchas.activationRequiresCurrentVersionId: GET the workflow first to obtain versionId, then POST /activate with it. A stale versionId returns 200 but does not activate.
